_**User**_

为什么要使用colcon

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7-thinking-xhigh)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
 用户想了解为什么要用 colcon 而不是直接用 cmake。我需要从几个角度来解释：首先说明不用 colcon 也能编译，但 colcon 带来的便利性；然后对比传统的 cmake、catkin 等方案；最后结合 Fast-DDS 学习场景说明具体优势。colcon 的核心价值在于能够并行构建多个包，这是我要重点阐述的。 性管理多个 CMake 项目（fastcdr / foonathan_memory / fastdds）
2. **依赖图自动解析**：根据 `package.xml` 自动决定先后编译顺序
3. **统一的 install 树**：所有包安装到同一个 install/ 下，方便 source
4. **环境变量自动管理**：`setup.bash` 一行 source 所有库都能找到
5. **标准化的 workspace 模式**：src/build/install/log 四层目录是 ROS 2 标准
6. **跨包测试支持**：colcon test 统一测所有包
7. **生态兼容**：ROS 2 的标准构建工具，Fast-DDS 是 ROS 2 默认 DDS，命中标准

但 colcon 也有"代价"：
- 多一层间接（colcon → cmake → make/ninja）
- 出错信息可能被 colcon 截断
- 学习曲线（先学 cmake，再学 colcon）

对比直接 cmake 三段式编译（fastcdr → foonathan → fastdds）：
- 你得手写 3 个 cmake configure
- 你得手写 3 个 make install
- 你得手写 CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH 串起来
- 你得自己解决依赖顺序

现在要梳理什么时候真的不需要 colcon——比如单个包开发、快速迭代调试、或者嵌入式环境受限的场景。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7-thinking-xhigh)**_

绝佳问题！这正是理解**现代 C++ 多包项目管理**的关键。让我用"**没有 colcon 你会多痛苦**"来反证它的价值。

---

## 一、最直接的答案

**因为 Fast-DDS 不是一个"独立项目"，而是一个"多包项目"——至少 3 个 CMake 项目要协同编译：**

```
fastdds  ──depends──>  fastcdr
   │
   └───depends──>  foonathan_memory  ──depends──>  foonathan_memory_vendor
```

**colcon 的本质**：**多 CMake 项目自动化编排工具**。

不用 colcon 你也能编，但要**手动**做 colcon 帮你做的所有事——下面我演示一下。

---

## 二、不用 colcon 的"手工档"流程

```bash
# ============ 1. 编译 foonathan_memory_vendor ============
cd /workspace/ws/src/foonathan_memory_vendor
mkdir build && cd build
cmake .. \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/workspace/ws/install \
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
  -GNinja
ninja -j$(nproc)
ninja install
# 产物: /workspace/ws/install/lib/libfoonathan_memory*.so
#       /workspace/ws/install/share/foonathan_memory/cmake/*.cmake

# ============ 2. 编译 fastcdr ============
cd /workspace/ws/src/fastcdr
mkdir build && cd build
cmake .. \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/workspace/ws/install \
  -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/workspace/ws/install \              # ← 找 foonathan_memory
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
  -GNinja
ninja -j$(nproc)
ninja install

# ============ 3. 编译 fastdds（主菜）============
cd /workspace/Fast-DDS
mkdir build && cd build
cmake .. \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
  -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/workspace/ws/install \
  -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/workspace/ws/install \              # ← 找 fastcdr+foonathan
  -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
  -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
  -GNinja
ninja -j$(nproc)
ninja install

# ============ 4. 配置环境变量 ============
export CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=/workspace/ws/install:$CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/workspace/ws/install/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH
export PATH=/workspace/ws/install/bin:$PATH
```

**痛点统计**（一共 4 个）：

| 痛点 | 描述 |
|---|---|
| 1. **顺序得自己排** | 必须先 foonathan，再 fastcdr，最后 fastdds（依赖正确顺序，错了链接失败） |
| 2. **`CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH` 要手动串** | 每个包都得告诉它"前面装到哪了" |
| 3. **变量手动 export** | LD_LIBRARY_PATH / PATH 都要自己加 |
| 4. **不能并行** | 每条命令串行跑，浪费 CPU |

**colcon 把以上 4 件事自动化了**。

---

## 三、colcon 帮你做的 7 件事

### 1. ⭐ 依赖图自动解析

colcon 读每个包的 **`package.xml`**（ROS 2 标准元数据文件）：

```xml
<!-- src/fastcdr/package.xml -->
<package format="3">
  <name>fastcdr</name>
  <buildtool_depend>cmake</buildtool_depend>
</package>

<!-- src/fastdds/package.xml -->
<package format="3">
  <name>fastdds</name>
  <buildtool_depend>cmake</buildtool_depend>
  <depend>fastcdr</depend>              <!-- ← 这一行告诉 colcon 我依赖 fastcdr -->
  <depend>foonathan_memory_vendor</depend>
</package>
```

colcon 解析后**自动构建依赖图**：

```
foonathan_memory_vendor (depth 0)
        ↓
fastcdr (depth 0)        ← 这两个互不依赖，可以并行
        ↓
fastdds (depth 1)        ← 等上面两个完成后才能开始
```

**你只要 `colcon build`，它自己排好顺序**。

### 2. ⭐ 多包并行

```
Time →
foonathan_memory_vendor ████████████
fastcdr                 ████████             ← 同时编！
                                 ↓
fastdds                          ████████████████████████
```

`--parallel-workers $(nproc)` 利用所有 CPU 核心，**多包之间并行**（包内本来就并行）。

### 3. ⭐ 自动管理 `CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH`

```
编 fastcdr 时，colcon 自动:
  CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH = $WS/install/foonathan_memory_vendor
  
编 fastdds 时，colcon 自动:
  CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH = $WS/install/fastcdr:$WS/install/foonathan_memory_vendor
```

**你完全不用关心**——colcon 知道这个包依赖哪些，把对应的 prefix 路径喂给 cmake。

### 4. ⭐ 统一的 `install/setup.bash`

编完之后**一句话**让所有库可用：

```bash
source install/setup.bash
```

它自动设：
- `CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH`
- `LD_LIBRARY_PATH`
- `PATH`
- `PKG_CONFIG_PATH`
- `PYTHONPATH`
- 还有 ROS 2 相关的 `AMENT_PREFIX_PATH` 等

**之后任何 cmake 项目 `find_package(fastdds)` 就能找到刚编的**。

### 5. ⭐ 增量编译（包级别）

```bash
# 改了 fastdds 一个文件
./build.sh

# colcon 检测到只有 fastdds 包改了
# → 跳过 fastcdr, foonathan_memory（已经装好了）
# → 只增量编 fastdds 受影响的 .cpp
```

跟 `make` 的文件级增量编译**叠加**，**双层加速**。

### 6. ⭐ 统一的 build/install/log 目录结构

ROS 2 标准布局：

```
ws/
├── src/                        ← 源码
│   ├── fastcdr/
│   ├── foonathan_memory_vendor/
│   └── fastdds/
├── build/                      ← 中间产物（每个包一个子目录）
│   ├── fastcdr/
│   ├── foonathan_memory_vendor/
│   └── fastdds/
├── install/                    ← 最终安装（--merge-install 合并）
│   ├── lib/
│   ├── include/
│   └── share/
└── log/                        ← 编译日志（每次跑一个子目录）
    ├── latest/                 ← 软链接指向最新
    └── build_2026-05-21_xxxx/
```

**清理特别方便**：

```bash
rm -rf build install log      # 干干净净
# 而 src/ 一动不动，依赖源码还在
```

### 7. ⭐ 统一测试

```bash
colcon test                   # 跑所有包的测试
colcon test --packages-select fastdds   # 只跑 fastdds 的
colcon test-result --verbose  # 看测试报告
```

不用每个包单独 `cd build && ctest`。

---

## 四、对比表：colcon vs 手工 cmake vs make build system

| 维度 | 直接 cmake | colcon | 备注 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 单个项目 | ✅ 简单 | ❌ 多余 | colcon 不适合单包项目 |
| 多包项目 | ❌ 手工串依赖 | ✅ 自动 | colcon 的核心价值 |
| 并行多包 | ❌ 手写脚本 | ✅ `--parallel-workers` | 性能优势 |
| 依赖顺序 | ❌ 你来排 | ✅ 自动 | 包多了排不过来 |
| 环境变量 | ❌ 手工 export | ✅ `setup.bash` | 用起来方便 |
| 学习曲线 | 低（标准 cmake） | 中（多一层） | trade-off |
| 错误调试 | ✅ 直接看 cmake | ⚠️ 错误被嵌套 | colcon 有时遮蔽信息 |
| ROS 2 生态 | ⚠️ 兼容性差 | ✅ 一等公民 | ROS 2 必备 |

---

## 五、`build.sh` 里 colcon 命令逐行解释

```215:223:/media/hb301/87c330ec-7ed2-4c3d-895f-8503adba9898/_project/Fast-DDS/build.sh
    colcon build \
        --merge-install \
        --cmake-args \
            -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE="$BUILD_TYPE" \
            -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
            -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
            -DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON \
            -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON \
        --event-handlers console_cohesion+ desktop_notification- status- \
        --parallel-workers "$PARALLEL_WORKERS"
```

| 参数 | 作用 |
|---|---|
| `colcon build` | 主命令 |
| `--merge-install` | 所有包合并到 `install/`，**让 find_package 简单** |
| `--cmake-args` | 后面的所有 `-D` 都**透传给底层每个 cmake** |
| `-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE` | Release/Debug 模式 |
| `-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache` | gcc/g++ 自动走 ccache 缓存 |
| `-DCMAKE_C_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache` | gcc 也走 ccache（C 文件） |
| `-DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=ON` | 编动态库（.so） |
| `-DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON` | 生成 `compile_commands.json`（**IDE 跳转必备**） |
| `--event-handlers console_cohesion+` | 编译输出**按包聚合**显示（不会乱成一锅粥） |
| `desktop_notification-` | 关闭桌面通知（容器里也没桌面） |
| `status-` | 关闭进度条（log 干净） |
| `--parallel-workers $(nproc)` | 多包并行编译 |

---

## 六、colcon 的"缺点"

不是没有：

| 缺点 | 影响 | 解决 |
|---|---|---|
| 多一层间接 | 调试 cmake 配置不直观 | `colcon build --cmake-args -DCMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE=ON` 或直接进 `build/<pkg>/` 看 |
| 错误日志被收集 | error 可能不在屏幕上 | 看 `log/latest_build/<pkg>/stderr.log` |
| 学习曲线 | 初学者第一次见 | 但只是套了层壳，cmake 还是核心 |
| 强依赖 `package.xml` | 没这个文件就不被识别 | 不过 fastcdr/foonathan/fastdds 都自带 |

---

## 七、什么时候**不**用 colcon？

| 场景 | 用什么 |
|---|---|
| 编一个独立的小项目 | 直接 cmake |
| 学单个库的内部代码 | 直接 cmake（进 `src/cpp/build/` 看清晰一些） |
| Windows + Visual Studio | colcon 支持但不爽，可以直接 cmake + VS |
| CI 中跑 Fast-DDS | colcon（标准方式） |
| ROS 2 项目 | **必须** colcon |
| Fast-DDS 学习 | colcon（自动化、跟生态一致） |

---

## 八、Fast-DDS 项目里 colcon 的**特殊价值**

回到我们的具体场景：

### 1. Fast-DDS 是 ROS 2 默认 DDS

```
ROS 2 ──depends──> Fast-DDS ──depends──> fastcdr + foonathan_memory
```

ROS 2 用 colcon 编译，**Fast-DDS 也用 colcon 编译**——保持一致。

### 2. eProsima 官方推荐 colcon

去看 [Fast-DDS 官方安装文档](https://fast-dds.docs.eprosima.com/en/latest/installation/sources/sources_linux.html)，第一段就是：

> "The recommended way to build Fast DDS from sources is using a colcon workspace"

### 3. 我们的 3 个包恰好是 colcon 的"理想题材"

| 包 | 类型 | 编译时间 |
|---|---|---|
| foonathan_memory_vendor | 小（< 1 分钟） | 几乎瞬间 |
| fastcdr | 中（1~2 分钟） | 跟 foonathan 并行 |
| fastdds | 大（5~20 分钟） | 等前两个完成 |

并行编译能省下 1~2 分钟的总时间。

---

## 九、不用 colcon 的"逃生路径"

如果你**就是想用纯 cmake**，第二部分（"手工档"）的命令就是完整方案。你可以试试。但学习场景下，**colcon 的好处大于代价**。

---

## 十、一句话总结

> **colcon 是 ROS 2 生态的多 CMake 项目编排工具**，它自动处理：依赖图、编译顺序、并行调度、`CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH` 传递、环境变量管理、统一安装目录。在 Fast-DDS 这种"主库依赖 2 个子库"的场景下，它把**4 步手工 cmake + 串依赖 + 手 export 环境**简化成**一句 `colcon build`**。

---

## 接下来你可以做：

```bash
# 容器里
./build.sh help          # 看一下帮助
./build.sh               # 直接开编（10~30 分钟）
```

需要的话也可以**先跑 `./build.sh deps`** 只准备依赖、不编译，验证 vcs import 通畅再正式编。要继续了吗？

---

_**User**_

#
# Copyright (C) 2026 by Thun Lu. All rights reserved.
#

#[=======================================================================[.rst:
fastdds:
  example 1:
  vlink_generate_cpp (
    DDS
    sample.idl
  )
  add_executable(example ${VLINK_GEN_HDRS} ${VLINK_GEN_SRCS})
  example 2:
  vlink_generate_cpp (
    TARGET sample_target
    DDS
    sample.idl
    OUT_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/out"
    FLAGS ""
  )
  target_link_libraries(example sample_target)

protobuf:
  example 1:
  vlink_generate_cpp (
    PROTO
    sample.proto
  )
  add_executable(example ${VLINK_GEN_HDRS} ${VLINK_GEN_SRCS})
  example 2:
  vlink_generate_cpp (
    TARGET sample_target
    PROTO
    sample.proto
    OUT_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/out"
    FLAGS ""
  )
  target_link_libraries(example sample_target)

flatbuffers:
  example 1:
  vlink_generate_cpp (
    FBS
    sample.fbs
  )
  add_executable(example ${VLINK_GEN_HDRS} ${VLINK_GEN_SRCS})
  example 2:
  vlink_generate_cpp (
    TARGET sample_target
    FBS
    OUT_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/out"
    sample.fbs
    FLAGS ""
  )
  target_link_libraries(example sample_target)

flatbuffers registry:
  example 1:
  vlink_generate_flatbuffers_registry_cpp(
    foo.fbs
    bar.fbs
  )
  # Requires the corresponding vlink_generate_cpp(FBS ...) step, which now
  # emits both foo.fbs.hpp and foo_bfbs.fbs.hpp (BFBS embedded helper header).
  target_sources(my_schema_plugin PRIVATE ${VLINK_GEN_REGISTRY_SRCS})

  example 2:
  vlink_generate_flatbuffers_registry_cpp(
    TARGET fb_registry
    OUT_DIR "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/generated"
    OUTPUT  "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/generated/fb_registry.cc"
    foo.fbs
    bar.fbs
  )
  target_link_libraries(my_schema_plugin PRIVATE fb_registry)
#]=======================================================================]

function(
  _vlink_generate_fastdds_cpp
  inputs
  in_dir
  out_dir
  flags
  out_hdrs
  out_srcs
)
  set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE fastddsgen)
  if(DEFINED ENV{VLINK_DDSGEN_PROGRAM})
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE $ENV{VLINK_DDSGEN_PROGRAM})
  elseif(DEFINED FASTDDS_GEN_EXECUTABLE)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${FASTDDS_GEN_EXECUTABLE})
  elseif(DEFINED DDSGEN_PROGRAM)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${DDSGEN_PROGRAM})
  elseif(WIN32)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE fastddsgen.bat)
  endif()
  foreach(it ${inputs})
    get_filename_component(itdir ${it} DIRECTORY)
    get_filename_component(outfilename ${it} NAME_WE)
    if(in_dir)
      get_filename_component(filedir "${in_dir}" ABSOLUTE)
      file(RELATIVE_PATH dir_suffix "${filedir}" "${itdir}")
      set(dir_suffix /${dir_suffix})
    else()
      set(filedir ${itdir})
      set(dir_suffix)
    endif()
    if(TARGET fastdds)
      separate_arguments(
        command
        NATIVE_COMMAND
        "${_TARGET_GEN_EXE} -I ${filedir} -d ${out_dir}${dir_suffix} ${it} -flat-output-dir -t ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.fastddsgen -replace ${flags}"
      )
      set(gen_hdr
          "${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.hpp;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}PubSubTypes.hpp;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}CdrAux.hpp;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}CdrAux.ipp;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}TypeObjectSupport.hpp"
      )
      set(gen_src
          "${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.cxx;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}PubSubTypes.cxx;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}TypeObjectSupport.cxx"
      )
    else()
      separate_arguments(
        command
        NATIVE_COMMAND
        "${_TARGET_GEN_EXE} -I ${filedir} -d ${out_dir}${dir_suffix} ${it} -t ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.fastddsgen -replace ${flags}"
      )
      set(gen_hdr "${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.h;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}PubSubTypes.h")
      set(gen_src "${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.cxx;${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}PubSubTypes.cxx")
    endif()
    add_custom_command(
      OUTPUT ${gen_hdr} ${gen_src}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.fastddsgen
      COMMAND ${command}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch ${gen_hdr} ${gen_src}
      DEPENDS ${it}
      VERBATIM
      WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    )
    list(APPEND gen_hdrs ${gen_hdr})
    list(APPEND gen_srcs ${gen_src})
  endforeach()
  set(out_hdrs
      ${gen_hdrs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
  set(out_srcs
      ${gen_srcs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
endfunction()

function(
  _vlink_generate_protobuf_cpp
  inputs
  in_dir
  out_dir
  flags
  out_hdrs
  out_srcs
)
  if(NOT Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE AND TARGET protobuf::protoc)
    get_target_property(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE protobuf::protoc IMPORTED_LOCATION)
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE protobuf::protoc IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE protobuf::protoc IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELWITHDEBINFO)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE protobuf::protoc IMPORTED_LOCATION_MINSIZEREL)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE protobuf::protoc IMPORTED_LOCATION_DEBUG)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE protobuf::protoc IMPORTED_LOCATION_NOCONFIG)
    endif()
  endif()
  set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE protoc${CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX})
  if(DEFINED ENV{VLINK_PROTOC_PROGRAM})
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE $ENV{VLINK_PROTOC_PROGRAM})
  elseif(protobuf_PACKAGE_FOLDER_RELEASE)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${protobuf_PACKAGE_FOLDER_RELEASE}/bin/protoc${CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX})
  elseif(protobuf_PACKAGE_FOLDER_DEBUG)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${protobuf_PACKAGE_FOLDER_DEBUG}/bin/protoc${CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX})
  elseif(Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${Protobuf_PROTOC_EXECUTABLE})
  elseif(DEFINED PROTOC_PROGRAM)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${PROTOC_PROGRAM})
  endif()
  foreach(it ${inputs})
    get_filename_component(itdir ${it} DIRECTORY)
    get_filename_component(outfilename ${it} NAME_WE)
    if(in_dir)
      get_filename_component(filedir "${in_dir}" ABSOLUTE)
      file(RELATIVE_PATH dir_suffix "${filedir}" "${itdir}")
      set(dir_suffix /${dir_suffix})
    else()
      set(filedir ${itdir})
      set(dir_suffix)
    endif()
    separate_arguments(command NATIVE_COMMAND "${_TARGET_GEN_EXE} -I${filedir} --cpp_out=${out_dir} ${it} ${flags}")
    set(gen_hdr ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.pb.h)
    set(gen_src ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.pb.cc)
    add_custom_command(
      OUTPUT ${gen_hdr} ${gen_src}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}
      COMMAND ${command}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch ${gen_hdr} ${gen_src}
      DEPENDS ${it}
      VERBATIM
      WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    )
    list(APPEND gen_hdrs ${gen_hdr})
    list(APPEND gen_srcs ${gen_src})
  endforeach()
  set(out_hdrs
      ${gen_hdrs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
  set(out_srcs
      ${gen_srcs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
endfunction()

function(
  _vlink_generate_flatbuffers_cpp
  inputs
  in_dir
  out_dir
  flags
  out_hdrs
  out_srcs
)
  if(NOT Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE AND TARGET flatbuffers::flatc)
    get_target_property(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE flatbuffers::flatc IMPORTED_LOCATION)
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE flatbuffers::flatc IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE flatbuffers::flatc IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELWITHDEBINFO)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE flatbuffers::flatc IMPORTED_LOCATION_MINSIZEREL)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE flatbuffers::flatc IMPORTED_LOCATION_DEBUG)
    endif()
    if(NOT EXISTS "${Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE}")
      get_target_property(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE flatbuffers::flatc IMPORTED_LOCATION_NOCONFIG)
    endif()
  endif()
  set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE flatc${CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX})
  if(DEFINED ENV{VLINK_FLATC_PROGRAM})
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE $ENV{VLINK_FLATC_PROGRAM})
  elseif(flatbuffers_PACKAGE_FOLDER_RELEASE)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${flatbuffers_PACKAGE_FOLDER_RELEASE}/bin/flatc${CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX})
  elseif(flatbuffers_PACKAGE_FOLDER_DEBUG)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${flatbuffers_PACKAGE_FOLDER_DEBUG}/bin/flatc${CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_SUFFIX})
  elseif(Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${Flatbuffers_FLATC_EXECUTABLE})
  elseif(DEFINED FLATC_PROGRAM)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${FLATC_PROGRAM})
  endif()
  foreach(it ${inputs})
    get_filename_component(itdir ${it} DIRECTORY)
    get_filename_component(outfilename ${it} NAME_WE)
    if(in_dir)
      get_filename_component(filedir "${in_dir}" ABSOLUTE)
      file(RELATIVE_PATH dir_suffix "${filedir}" "${itdir}")
      set(dir_suffix /${dir_suffix})
    else()
      set(filedir ${itdir})
      set(dir_suffix)
    endif()
    separate_arguments(
      command
      NATIVE_COMMAND
      "${_TARGET_GEN_EXE} -c ${flags} -I ${filedir} -o ${out_dir}${dir_suffix} ${it} --filename-suffix .fbs --filename-ext hpp --cpp-std=c++17 --gen-object-api --gen-name-strings --bfbs-gen-embed"
    )
    set(gen_hdr ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}.fbs.hpp)
    set(gen_bfbs_hdr ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}/${outfilename}_bfbs.fbs.hpp)
    add_custom_command(
      OUTPUT ${gen_hdr} ${gen_bfbs_hdr}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory ${out_dir}${dir_suffix}
      COMMAND ${command}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch ${gen_hdr}
      COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch ${gen_bfbs_hdr}
      DEPENDS ${it}
      VERBATIM
      WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    )
    list(APPEND gen_hdrs ${gen_hdr} ${gen_bfbs_hdr})
  endforeach()
  set(out_hdrs
      ${gen_hdrs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
  set(out_srcs
      ""
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
endfunction()

function(vlink_generate_cpp)
  set(options DDS PROTO FLAT FBS)
  set(one_value_args TARGET FLAGS IN_DIR OUT_DIR)
  set(multi_value_args)
  set(VLINK_GEN_HEADER_ONLY FALSE)
  cmake_parse_arguments(VLINK_GEN "${options}" "${one_value_args}" "${multi_value_args}" ${ARGN})
  if(NOT VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR)
    set(VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR)
  endif()
  if(NOT VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR)
    set(VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR})
  endif()
  set(VLINK_GEN_INPUTS ${VLINK_GEN_UNPARSED_ARGUMENTS})
  if(NOT VLINK_GEN_INPUTS)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Error: vlink_generate_cpp called without any input files")
  endif()
  foreach(it ${VLINK_GEN_INPUTS})
    get_filename_component(filepath ${it} ABSOLUTE)
    list(APPEND ABS_INPUTS ${filepath})
  endforeach()
  if(VLINK_GEN_DDS)
    if(NOT TARGET fastrtps)
      find_package(fastrtps CONFIG QUIET)
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET fastdds)
      find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET fastcdr)
      find_package(fastcdr CONFIG QUIET)
    endif()
    _vlink_generate_fastdds_cpp(
      "${ABS_INPUTS}" "${VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR}" "${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR}" "${VLINK_GEN_FLAGS}" out_hdrs out_srcs
    )
    if(TARGET fastdds)
      set(depend_libs fastcdr fastdds)
    else()
      set(depend_libs fastcdr fastrtps)
    endif()
  elseif(VLINK_GEN_PROTO)
    if(NOT TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf OR NOT TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf-lite)
      find_package(Protobuf CONFIG QUIET)
      if(NOT TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf OR NOT TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf-lite)
        find_package(Protobuf QUIET)
      endif()
    endif()
    _vlink_generate_protobuf_cpp(
      "${ABS_INPUTS}" "${VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR}" "${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR}" "${VLINK_GEN_FLAGS}" out_hdrs out_srcs
    )
    if(TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf)
      set(depend_libs protobuf::libprotobuf)
    elseif(TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf-lite)
      set(depend_libs protobuf::libprotobuf-lite)
    endif()
  elseif(VLINK_GEN_FLAT OR VLINK_GEN_FBS)
    set(VLINK_GEN_HEADER_ONLY TRUE)
    if(NOT TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers OR NOT TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared)
      find_package(Flatbuffers CONFIG QUIET)
    endif()
    _vlink_generate_flatbuffers_cpp(
      "${ABS_INPUTS}" "${VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR}" "${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR}" "${VLINK_GEN_FLAGS}" out_hdrs out_srcs
    )
    if(TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared)
      set(depend_libs flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared)
    elseif(TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers)
      set(depend_libs flatbuffers::flatbuffers)
    endif()
  else()
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Error: vlink_generate_cpp called without any types")
  endif()
  if("${out_hdrs}" STREQUAL "" AND "${out_srcs}" STREQUAL "")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Error: vlink_generate_cpp called without any output files")
  endif()
  set(VLINK_GEN_HDRS
      ${out_hdrs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
  set(VLINK_GEN_SRCS
      ${out_srcs}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
  if(VLINK_GEN_TARGET)
    if(VLINK_GEN_HEADER_ONLY)
      if(${CMAKE_VERSION} VERSION_LESS "3.20.0")
        add_library(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE)
        target_include_directories(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR})
        set_source_files_properties(${out_hdrs} PROPERTIES SKIP_LINTING ON)
        add_custom_target(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET}_outgen DEPENDS ${out_hdrs})
        add_dependencies(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} ${VLINK_GEN_TARGET}_outgen)
      else()
        add_library(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${out_hdrs})
        target_include_directories(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR})
        set_source_files_properties(${out_hdrs} PROPERTIES SKIP_LINTING ON)
        set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
        set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES CXX_CLANG_TIDY "")
      endif()
      target_sources(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${ABS_INPUTS})
      if(depend_libs)
        target_link_libraries(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${depend_libs})
      endif()
    else()
      add_library(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} OBJECT ${out_hdrs} ${out_srcs})
      target_include_directories(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PUBLIC ${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR})
      set_source_files_properties(${out_hdrs} ${out_srcs} PROPERTIES SKIP_LINTING ON)
      set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
      set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES CXX_CLANG_TIDY "")
      target_sources(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${ABS_INPUTS})
      if(depend_libs)
        target_link_libraries(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PUBLIC ${depend_libs})
      endif()
    endif()
  endif()
endfunction()

function(vlink_generate_flatbuffers_registry_cpp)
  set(options)
  set(one_value_args TARGET IN_DIR OUT_DIR OUTPUT)
  set(multi_value_args)
  set(VLINK_GEN_HEADER_ONLY TRUE)
  cmake_parse_arguments(VLINK_GEN "${options}" "${one_value_args}" "${multi_value_args}" ${ARGN})
  if(NOT VLINK_GEN_UNPARSED_ARGUMENTS)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Error: vlink_generate_flatbuffers_registry_cpp called without any input files")
  endif()
  if(NOT VLINK_GEN_OUTPUT)
    set(VLINK_GEN_OUTPUT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/vlink_flatbuffers_registry.cc")
  endif()
  if(NOT VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR)
    set(VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}")
  endif()
  file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR}")
  set(inc_lines "")
  set(reg_lines "")
  foreach(it ${VLINK_GEN_UNPARSED_ARGUMENTS})
    get_filename_component(abs_fbs ${it} ABSOLUTE)
    get_filename_component(abs_fbs_dir ${abs_fbs} DIRECTORY)
    get_filename_component(base ${abs_fbs} NAME_WE)
    if(VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR)
      get_filename_component(filedir "${VLINK_GEN_IN_DIR}" ABSOLUTE)
      file(RELATIVE_PATH dir_suffix "${filedir}" "${abs_fbs_dir}")
      set(dir_suffix "/${dir_suffix}")
      if(dir_suffix STREQUAL "/.")
        set(dir_suffix "")
      endif()
      set(include_dir_suffix "${dir_suffix}")
      if(include_dir_suffix)
        string(REGEX REPLACE "^/" "" include_dir_suffix "${include_dir_suffix}")
      endif()
    else()
      set(dir_suffix "")
      set(include_dir_suffix "")
    endif()
    file(READ "${abs_fbs}" _content)
    string(REGEX REPLACE "/\\*([^*]|\\*+[^*/])*\\*+/" "" _content "${_content}")
    string(REGEX REPLACE "//[^\n]*" "" _content "${_content}")
    string(REGEX MATCH "root_type[ \t\r\n]+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)[ \t\r\n]*;" _root_match "${_content}")
    if(NOT _root_match)
      continue()
    endif()
    set(_root "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
    string(FIND "${_content}" "${_root_match}" _root_pos)
    if(_root_pos LESS 0)
      set(_prefix "${_content}")
    else()
      string(SUBSTRING "${_content}" 0 ${_root_pos} _prefix)
    endif()
    set(_prefix_guarded "\n${_prefix}")
    string(REGEX MATCHALL "[^A-Za-z0-9_]namespace[ \t\r\n]+[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_.]*" _ns_stmts "${_prefix_guarded}")
    set(_namespace "")
    list(LENGTH _ns_stmts _ns_count)
    if(_ns_count GREATER 0)
      math(EXPR _last_idx "${_ns_count} - 1")
      list(GET _ns_stmts ${_last_idx} _last_stmt)
      string(REGEX MATCH "namespace[ \t\r\n]+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_.]*)" _discard "${_last_stmt}")
      set(_namespace "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
    endif()
    if(_namespace)
      string(REPLACE "." "::" cppns "${_namespace}")
      set(_cpp_type "${cppns}::${_root}BinarySchema")
      set(_flat_name "${_namespace}.${_root}")
    else()
      set(_cpp_type "::${_root}BinarySchema")
      set(_flat_name "${_root}")
    endif()
    if(include_dir_suffix)
      set(_include_path "${include_dir_suffix}/${base}_bfbs.fbs.hpp")
    else()
      set(_include_path "${base}_bfbs.fbs.hpp")
    endif()
    string(APPEND inc_lines "#include \"${_include_path}\"\n")
    string(APPEND reg_lines "VLINK_REGISTER_FLATBUFFERS(\"${_flat_name}\", ${_cpp_type});\n")
  endforeach()
  file(
    WRITE "${VLINK_GEN_OUTPUT}"
    "// This file is auto-generated by vlink_generate_flatbuffers_registry_cpp.\n\n#include <vlink/extension/flatbuffers_registry.h>\n"
  )
  file(APPEND "${VLINK_GEN_OUTPUT}" "${inc_lines}\n")
  file(APPEND "${VLINK_GEN_OUTPUT}" "${reg_lines}\n")
  set(VLINK_GEN_REGISTRY_SRCS
      ${VLINK_GEN_OUTPUT}
      PARENT_SCOPE
  )
  if(NOT TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers OR NOT TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared)
    find_package(Flatbuffers CONFIG QUIET)
  endif()
  if(TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared)
    set(depend_libs flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared)
  elseif(TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers)
    set(depend_libs flatbuffers::flatbuffers)
  endif()
  if(VLINK_GEN_TARGET)
    if(VLINK_GEN_HEADER_ONLY)
      if(${CMAKE_VERSION} VERSION_LESS "3.20.0")
        add_library(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE)
        target_include_directories(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR})
        set_source_files_properties(${out_hdrs} PROPERTIES SKIP_LINTING ON)
        add_custom_target(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET}_outgen DEPENDS ${out_hdrs})
        add_dependencies(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} ${VLINK_GEN_TARGET}_outgen)
      else()
        add_library(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${out_hdrs})
        target_include_directories(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR})
        set_source_files_properties(${out_hdrs} PROPERTIES SKIP_LINTING ON)
        set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
        set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES CXX_CLANG_TIDY "")
      endif()
      target_sources(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${ABS_INPUTS})
      if(depend_libs)
        target_link_libraries(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${depend_libs})
      endif()
    else()
      add_library(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} OBJECT ${out_hdrs} ${out_srcs})
      target_include_directories(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PUBLIC ${VLINK_GEN_OUT_DIR})
      set_source_files_properties(${out_hdrs} ${out_srcs} PROPERTIES SKIP_LINTING ON)
      set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
      set_target_properties(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PROPERTIES CXX_CLANG_TIDY "")
      target_sources(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} INTERFACE ${ABS_INPUTS})
      if(depend_libs)
        target_link_libraries(${VLINK_GEN_TARGET} PUBLIC ${depend_libs})
      endif()
    endif()
  endif()
endfunction()

这个是如何编译dds的

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7-thinking-xhigh)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
 用户问的是这个 CMake 模块如何编译 DDS，但实际上这不是直接编译 DDS 库，而是一个代码生成器——它从 `.idl`、`.proto` 或 `.fbs` 等接口定义文件生成对应的 C++ 代码，然后才能编译这些生成的代码。

模块包含四个主要函数：处理 IDL 文件的 FastDDS 生成器、处理 Protobuf 的生成器、处理 FlatBuffers 的生成器，以及一个公共分发函数，还有一个专门生成 FlatBuffers 类型注册代码的函数。我现在要详细看 DDS 部分是怎么工作的——它通过查找 `fastddsgen` 工具来处理 IDL 文件。

Analyzing the DDS generation function... Writing CMake configuration... Writing CMake generation logic...</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7-thinking-xhigh)**_

很好的问题！但有个**关键澄清**：这个文件**不是用来编译 Fast-DDS 库本身的**，而是给**使用 Fast-DDS 的下游用户**——把 `.idl` 文件**转换成 C++ 代码**的工具封装。让我把整条链路讲清楚。

---

## 一、先抓本质：这是什么文件？

```
名字：vlink_generate_cpp（"vlink" 是你们/某团队内部命名前缀）
作用：把 「序列化接口定义文件」 → 转换成 → 「C++ 源码 + 头文件」
       └─ DDS 用 .idl
       └─ Protobuf 用 .proto
       └─ FlatBuffers 用 .fbs
```

它是一个**通用代码生成器封装**，统一了三种序列化格式的调用方式。

---

## 二、DDS 部分的完整流程

### 步骤 1：你写一个 IDL 文件

```idl
// sample.idl - DDS 接口定义语言
struct HelloWorld
{
    unsigned long index;
    string message;
};
```

### 步骤 2：CMake 里调用

```cmake
find_package(fastdds REQUIRED)

vlink_generate_cpp(
    DDS
    sample.idl
)

add_executable(example main.cpp ${VLINK_GEN_HDRS} ${VLINK_GEN_SRCS})
target_link_libraries(example fastcdr fastdds)
```

### 步骤 3：编译时**自动**发生的事

```
sample.idl
     │
     │  ↓ fastddsgen 工具（来自 Fast-DDS 安装）
     │
     ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  生成 8 个文件 (Fast DDS 3.x 现代版):            │
│                                                  │
│  sample.hpp                    ← 数据类型定义    │
│  sample.cxx                    ← 数据类型实现    │
│  samplePubSubTypes.hpp         ← Pub/Sub 类型支持│
│  samplePubSubTypes.cxx         ← 同上实现        │
│  sampleCdrAux.hpp              ← CDR 辅助函数    │
│  sampleCdrAux.ipp              ← CDR 模板实现    │
│  sampleTypeObjectSupport.hpp   ← TypeObject 支持 │
│  sampleTypeObjectSupport.cxx   ← 同上实现        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
     │
     │  ↓ g++ 编译
     │
     ▼
sample.o, samplePubSubTypes.o, ...
     │
     │  ↓ 链接 libfastdds.so + libfastcdr.so
     │
     ▼
你的可执行文件 example
```

---

## 三、源码精读：DDS 函数的 5 个步骤

### 步骤 ①：定位 `fastddsgen` 工具

```cmake
set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE fastddsgen)
if(DEFINED ENV{VLINK_DDSGEN_PROGRAM})
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE $ENV{VLINK_DDSGEN_PROGRAM})
elseif(DEFINED FASTDDS_GEN_EXECUTABLE)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${FASTDDS_GEN_EXECUTABLE})
elseif(DEFINED DDSGEN_PROGRAM)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE ${DDSGEN_PROGRAM})
elseif(WIN32)
    set(_TARGET_GEN_EXE fastddsgen.bat)
endif()
```

**核心**：找一个叫 `fastddsgen` 的可执行文件。

**`fastddsgen` 是什么？**

| 属性 | 值 |
|---|---|
| 来源 | eProsima 的独立项目 [Fast-DDS-Gen](https://github.com/eProsima/Fast-DDS-Gen) |
| 实现语言 | **Java**（不是 C++） |
| 输入 | `.idl` 文件 |
| 输出 | C++ 源码 + 头文件 |
| 安装位置 | 通常在 `/usr/local/bin/fastddsgen`（脚本） |

**优先级**（多种来源回退）：

```
ENV{VLINK_DDSGEN_PROGRAM}      ← 你自己指定
FASTDDS_GEN_EXECUTABLE         ← CMake 变量
DDSGEN_PROGRAM                  ← 老版兼容
WIN32 → fastddsgen.bat          ← Windows
默认 → fastddsgen               ← Linux/macOS PATH 里找
```

### 步骤 ②：处理输入目录结构

```cmake
foreach(it ${inputs})
    get_filename_component(itdir ${it} DIRECTORY)
    get_filename_component(outfilename ${it} NAME_WE)
    if(in_dir)
        get_filename_component(filedir "${in_dir}" ABSOLUTE)
        file(RELATIVE_PATH dir_suffix "${filedir}" "${itdir}")
        set(dir_suffix /${dir_suffix})
    else()
        set(filedir ${itdir})
        set(dir_suffix)
    endif()
```

**作用**：保持源码的目录结构。

**举例**：

```
你的项目结构:
  src/idls/
    common/types.idl
    sensors/lidar.idl

调用:
  vlink_generate_cpp(DDS IN_DIR src/idls common/types.idl sensors/lidar.idl)

输出:
  build/common/types.hpp           ← 保留 common/ 子目录
  build/sensors/lidar.hpp          ← 保留 sensors/ 子目录
```

这就是 `dir_suffix` 的意义——**让生成出来的文件保持源码的目录层次**。

### 步骤 ③：根据 Fast DDS 版本选不同命令

```cmake
if(TARGET fastdds)
    # Fast DDS 3.x（现代版）
    separate_arguments(command NATIVE_COMMAND
        "${_TARGET_GEN_EXE} -I ${filedir} -d ${out_dir}${dir_suffix} ${it} -flat-output-dir -t ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.fastddsgen -replace ${flags}"
    )
    set(gen_hdr "...hpp;...PubSubTypes.hpp;...CdrAux.hpp;...CdrAux.ipp;...TypeObjectSupport.hpp")
    set(gen_src "...cxx;...PubSubTypes.cxx;...TypeObjectSupport.cxx")
else()
    # Fast RTPS 2.x（旧版兼容）
    separate_arguments(command NATIVE_COMMAND
        "${_TARGET_GEN_EXE} -I ${filedir} -d ${out_dir}${dir_suffix} ${it} -t ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.fastddsgen -replace ${flags}"
    )
    set(gen_hdr "...h;...PubSubTypes.h")
    set(gen_src "...cxx;...PubSubTypes.cxx")
endif()
```

**两种模式的关键差异**：

| 

---

_**User**_

#
# Copyright (C) 2026 by Thun Lu. All rights reserved.
#

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15...3.31)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# version
file(STRINGS version.txt VLINK_VERSION)
string(TIMESTAMP VLINK_VERSION_TIMESTAMP "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
execute_process(
  COMMAND git rev-parse HEAD
  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE VLINK_VERSION_COMMIT_ID
  OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE ERROR_QUIET
)
execute_process(
  COMMAND git describe --tags
  WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
  OUTPUT_VARIABLE VLINK_VERSION_TAG
  OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE ERROR_QUIET
)

# project
project(
  vlink
  VERSION ${VLINK_VERSION}
  DESCRIPTION "A high-performance communication middleware"
  LANGUAGES CXX
)
set(DOC_PROJECT_NAME "VLink")
set(DOC_PROJECT_LOGO "./doc/images/vlink-icon.svg")
set(PROJECT_NAMESPACE "vlink::")

# common
include(cmake/functions/common.cmake)
include(cmake/functions/generator.cmake)
vlink_check()
include(GNUInstallDirs)
include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
set(CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES OFF)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/bin)
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/lib)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/lib)
foreach(OUTPUTCONFIG Debug Release RelWithDebInfo MinSizeRel)
  string(TOUPPER "${OUTPUTCONFIG}" OUTPUTCONFIG_U)
  set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${OUTPUTCONFIG_U} ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/bin)
  set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${OUTPUTCONFIG_U} ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/lib)
  set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY_${OUTPUTCONFIG_U} ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/lib)
endforeach()
# set(CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES "RelWithDebInfo;Debug;Release;MinSizeRel" CACHE STRING "" FORCE)
if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)
  set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE "Release")
endif()
if(MSVC)
  set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} /MANIFEST:NO")
  set(CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS} /MANIFEST:NO")
  set(CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS} /MANIFEST:NO")
  add_compile_options(/wd4068 /wd4158 /wd4819 /wd5287)
  add_compile_options(/GL)
  add_link_options(/LTCG)
  add_link_options(/IGNORE:4078)
endif()
include(CheckCXXCompilerFlag)
check_cxx_compiler_flag("-std=c++20" COMPILER_SUPPORTS_CXX20)

# ipo
if(NOT MSVC AND NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "Debug")
  include(CheckIPOSupported)
  check_ipo_supported(RESULT ipo_supported)
  if(ipo_supported)
    message(STATUS "Enable Interprocedural Optimization")
    set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION TRUE)
  else()
    set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION FALSE)
  endif()
endif()
if(POLICY CMP0069)
  cmake_policy(SET CMP0069 NEW)
endif()

# options
option(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS "Build shared libraries" ON)
option(ENABLE_CPM_BUILD "Enable cpm build" OFF)
option(ENABLE_CPM_WHOLE_BUILD "Enable cpm-whole build" OFF)
option(ENABLE_CCACHE_BUILD "Enable ccache build" OFF)
option(ENABLE_DOC "Enable doc" OFF)
option(ENABLE_CXX_STD_20 "Enable cxx standard 20 features" ${COMPILER_SUPPORTS_CXX20})
option(ENABLE_C_API "Enable c api" ON)
option(ENABLE_PYTHON_API "Enable python api" OFF)
option(ENABLE_SECURITY "Enable security(ssl)" ON)
option(ENABLE_SQLITE "Enable sqlite" ON)
option(ENABLE_ZSTD "Enable zstd" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_INFO "Enable cli-info" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_BAG "Enable cli-bag" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO "Enable cli-eproto" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_EFBS "Enable cli-efbs" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_LIST "Enable cli-list" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_MONITOR "Enable cli-monitor" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_DUMP "Enable cli-dump" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_CHECK "Enable cli-check" ON)
option(ENABLE_CLI_BENCH "Enable cli-bench" ON)
option(ENABLE_PROXY "Enable proxy" ON)
option(ENABLE_VIEWER "Enable viewer" OFF)
option(ENABLE_WEBVIZ "Enable webviz" OFF)
option(ENABLE_COMPLETIONS "Install shell completion scripts" ON)
if(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS OR CMAKE_CXX_CLANG_TIDY)
  option(ENABLE_EXAMPLES "Enable examples" ON)
else()
  option(ENABLE_EXAMPLES "Enable examples" OFF)
endif()
option(ENABLE_WHOLE_EXAMPLES "Enable whole examples" OFF)
option(ENABLE_TEST "Enable test" OFF)
option(ENABLE_TEST_WARN "Enable test compiler warnings" OFF)
option(ENABLE_TEST_SANITIZE "Enable test memory sanitize" OFF)
option(ENABLE_TEST_COVERAGE "Enable test code coverage" OFF)
if(ENABLE_CXX_STD_20)
  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
endif()
if(ANDROID OR QNX)
  set(SELECT_LOG_BACKEND
      "native"
      CACHE STRING "Log backend [spdlog|quill|dlt|native]"
  )
else()
  set(SELECT_LOG_BACKEND
      "spdlog"
      CACHE STRING "Log backend [spdlog|quill|dlt|native]"
  )
endif()
set(INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR
    ${CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR}/${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}
    CACHE STRING "Install dir for config files (relative to prefix)"
)
set_property(CACHE SELECT_LOG_BACKEND PROPERTY STRINGS spdlog quill dlt native)
if("${SELECT_LOG_BACKEND}" STREQUAL "spdlog")
  set(ENABLE_LOG_SPD ON)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_QUI OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_DLT OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_NAT OFF)
elseif("${SELECT_LOG_BACKEND}" STREQUAL "quill")
  set(ENABLE_LOG_SPD OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_QUI ON)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_DLT OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_NAT OFF)
elseif("${SELECT_LOG_BACKEND}" STREQUAL "dlt")
  set(ENABLE_LOG_SPD OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_QUI OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_DLT ON)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_NAT OFF)
elseif("${SELECT_LOG_BACKEND}" STREQUAL "native")
  set(ENABLE_LOG_SPD OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_QUI OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_DLT OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_NAT ON)
else()
  set(ENABLE_LOG_SPD ON)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_QUI OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_DLT OFF)
  set(ENABLE_LOG_NAT OFF)
endif()
if(IS_ABSOLUTE "${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR}")
  string(REGEX REPLACE "^([A-Za-z]:)?[\\/]+" "" BUILD_CONFIG_DIR "${_dir}")
else()
  set(BUILD_CONFIG_DIR ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR})
endif()

# cpm-cmake
if(ENABLE_CPM_BUILD OR ENABLE_CPM_WHOLE_BUILD)
  include(cmake/fetch_thirdparty.cmake)
endif()

# requires
find_package(Threads REQUIRED)
if(ENABLE_SECURITY)
  find_package(OpenSSL 3.0.0 QUIET)
  if(NOT TARGET OpenSSL::Crypto)
    message(WARNING "Can not find openssl, set ENABLE_SECURITY to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_SECURITY OFF)
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_SQLITE)
  find_package(SQLite3 QUIET)
  if(NOT TARGET SQLite3::SQLite3 AND NOT TARGET SQLite::SQLite3)
    message(WARNING "Can not find sqlite, set ENABLE_SQLITE to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_SQLITE OFF)
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_ZSTD)
  find_package(zstd QUIET)
  if(NOT TARGET zstd::libzstd_shared AND NOT TARGET zstd::libzstd_static)
    message(WARNING "Can not find zstd, set ENABLE_ZSTD to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_ZSTD OFF)
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO
   OR ENABLE_CLI_DUMP
   OR ENABLE_PROXY
)
  find_package(Protobuf CONFIG QUIET)
  if(NOT TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf)
    find_package(Protobuf QUIET)
  endif()
  if(NOT TARGET protobuf::libprotobuf)
    message(WARNING "Can not find protobuf, set ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO/ENABLE_CLI_DUMP/ENABLE_PROXY to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO OFF)
    set(ENABLE_CLI_DUMP OFF)
    set(ENABLE_PROXY OFF)
  elseif(ENABLE_PROXY)
    if(NOT SKIP_DDS)
      find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)
      find_package(fastrtps CONFIG QUIET)
    endif()
    if(NOT SKIP_DDSC)
      find_package(CycloneDDS CONFIG QUIET)
    endif()
    if(NOT TARGET fastrtps
       AND NOT TARGET fastdds
       AND NOT TARGET CycloneDDS::ddsc
    )
      message(WARNING "Can not find fastdds or cyclonedds, set ENABLE_PROXY to OFF")
      set(ENABLE_PROXY OFF)
    endif()
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_EFBS)
  find_package(Flatbuffers CONFIG QUIET)
  if(NOT TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers_shared AND NOT TARGET flatbuffers::flatbuffers)
    message(WARNING "Can not find flatbuffers, set ENABLE_CLI_EFBS to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_CLI_EFBS OFF)
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_LOG_DLT)
  find_package(automotive-dlt QUIET)
  if(NOT TARGET Genivi::dlt)
    message(WARNING "Can not find dlt, set ENABLE_LOG_DLT to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_LOG_DLT OFF)
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_VIEWER)
  if(NOT ENABLE_PROXY)
    message(WARNING "Can not build viewer without proxy, set ENABLE_VIEWER to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_VIEWER OFF)
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_WEBVIZ)
  if(NOT ENABLE_PROXY)
    message(WARNING "Can not build webviz without proxy, set ENABLE_WEBVIZ to OFF")
    set(ENABLE_WEBVIZ OFF)
  endif()
endif()
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CXX_STD_20 ${ENABLE_CXX_STD_20})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_C_API ${ENABLE_C_API})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_SECURITY ${ENABLE_SECURITY})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_SQLITE ${ENABLE_SQLITE})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_ZSTD ${ENABLE_ZSTD})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_INFO ${ENABLE_CLI_INFO})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_BAG ${ENABLE_CLI_BAG})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_BENCH ${ENABLE_CLI_BENCH})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO ${ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_EFBS ${ENABLE_CLI_EFBS})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_LIST ${ENABLE_CLI_LIST})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_MONITOR ${ENABLE_CLI_MONITOR})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_DUMP ${ENABLE_CLI_DUMP})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_CLI_CHECK ${ENABLE_CLI_CHECK})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_SPD ${ENABLE_LOG_SPD})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_QUI ${ENABLE_LOG_QUI})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_DLT ${ENABLE_LOG_DLT})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_NAT ${ENABLE_LOG_NAT})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_PROXY ${ENABLE_PROXY})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_VIEWER ${ENABLE_VIEWER})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_WEBVIZ ${ENABLE_WEBVIZ})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_COMPLETIONS ${ENABLE_COMPLETIONS})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_EXAMPLES ${ENABLE_EXAMPLES})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_WHOLE_EXAMPLES ${ENABLE_WHOLE_EXAMPLES})
set(VLINK_ENABLE_TEST ${ENABLE_TEST})

# thirdparty(headeronly)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/lzav)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/argparse)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/doctest)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/json)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/mcap)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/eigen3)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/exprtk)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/asio)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/spdlog)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/quill)
add_subdirectory(thirdparty/websocketpp)

# ccache
if(ENABLE_CCACHE_BUILD)
  find_program(CCACHE_FOUND ccache)
  if(CCACHE_FOUND)
    set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY RULE_LAUNCH_COMPILE ccache)
    set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY RULE_LAUNCH_LINK ccache)
  endif()
endif()

# src
file(GLOB_RECURSE PROJECT_HDRS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/include/*.h)
file(GLOB_RECURSE PROJECT_SRCS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/*.cc)
add_library(${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_HDRS} ${PROJECT_SRCS})
add_library(${PROJECT_NAMESPACE}${PROJECT_NAME} ALIAS ${PROJECT_NAME})
set_target_properties(
  ${PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES VERSION ${PROJECT_VERSION} SOVERSION ${PROJECT_VERSION_MAJOR}.${PROJECT_VERSION_MINOR}
)
if(ENABLE_CXX_STD_20)
  target_compile_features(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC cxx_std_20)
  target_compile_options(
    ${PROJECT_NAME}
    PUBLIC
      $<$<AND:$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:GNU>,$<VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL:$<CXX_COMPILER_VERSION>,10>,$<VERSION_LESS:$<CXX_COMPILER_VERSION>,11>>:-fcoroutines>
  )
else()
  target_compile_features(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC cxx_std_17)
endif()
target_include_directories(
  ${PROJECT_NAME}
  PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
         $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/include/${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}>
         $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}>
)

if(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
  set(VLINK_APP_DEFINES)
  set(VLINK_LIB_DEFINES "VLINK_LIBRARY")
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${VLINK_LIB_DEFINES})
else()
  set(VLINK_APP_DEFINES "VLINK_LIBRARY_STATIC")
  set(VLINK_LIB_DEFINES "VLINK_LIBRARY_STATIC")
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC ${VLINK_LIB_DEFINES})
endif()
if(WIN32)
  list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS Iphlpapi ws2_32)
  if(MSVC)
    set_target_properties(${PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS "/wd4819")
    target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC "/utf-8")
  endif()
  if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
    target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC -Wno-ignored-attributes)
  endif()
else()
  target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:-fvisibility=hidden>)
  if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")
    list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS} rt)
    list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS
         "$<$<AND:$<CXX_COMPILER_ID:GNU>,$<VERSION_LESS:$<CXX_COMPILER_VERSION>,9.0>>:-lstdc++fs>"
    )
  elseif(QNX)
    list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS slog2 socket)
    if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_VERSION VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL "8.0.0")
      list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS fsnotify)
    else()
      list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS c++fs)
    endif()
  elseif(ANDROID)
    list(APPEND VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS log)
  elseif(APPLE)
    target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "_DARWIN_C_SOURCE")
  endif()
  set(PROTOBUF_GCC_POSITIVE_FLAGS)
  if(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU" AND CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL 12)
    list(APPEND PROTOBUF_GCC_POSITIVE_FLAGS -Wno-stringop-overflow)
  endif()
  if(PROTOBUF_GCC_POSITIVE_FLAGS)
    target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${PROTOBUF_GCC_POSITIVE_FLAGS}>)
    target_link_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${PROTOBUF_GCC_POSITIVE_FLAGS}>)
  endif()
endif()
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC Threads::Threads)
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${VLINK_PLATFORM_LIBS})
target_link_libraries(
  ${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE $<BUILD_INTERFACE:thirdparty::lzav> $<BUILD_INTERFACE:thirdparty::mcap>
                          $<BUILD_INTERFACE:thirdparty::json>
)
if(ENABLE_SECURITY)
  target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE OpenSSL::Crypto)
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_ENABLE_SECURITY")
endif()
if(ENABLE_SQLITE)
  if(TARGET SQLite3::SQLite3)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE SQLite3::SQLite3)
  elseif(TARGET SQLite::SQLite3)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE SQLite::SQLite3)
  endif()
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_ENABLE_SQLITE")
endif()
if(ENABLE_ZSTD)
  if(TARGET zstd::libzstd_shared)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE zstd::libzstd_shared)
  elseif(TARGET zstd::libzstd_static)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE zstd::libzstd_static)
  endif()
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_ENABLE_ZSTD")
endif()
if(ENABLE_LOG_SPD)
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_SPD")
  target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE $<BUILD_INTERFACE:thirdparty::spdlog>)
endif()
if(ENABLE_LOG_QUI)
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_QUI")
  target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE $<BUILD_INTERFACE:thirdparty::quill>)
endif()
if(ENABLE_LOG_DLT)
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_ENABLE_LOG_DLT")
  target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE Genivi::dlt)
endif()

# install
install(
  TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME}
  RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR}
  ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
  LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
)
install(
  DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/include/${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}
  DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}
  PATTERN ".*" EXCLUDE
)
install(FILES ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/CHANGELOG.md DESTINATION ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR})
if(ENABLE_DOC)
  install(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/examples DESTINATION ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR})
endif()

# uninstall
if(NOT TARGET uninstall)
  configure_file("${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/uninstall.cmake.in" "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/uninstall.cmake" @ONLY)
  add_custom_target(
    uninstall
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -P ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/uninstall.cmake
    COMMENT "Uninstalling files listed in install_manifest.txt ..."
  )
endif()

# modules
add_subdirectory(modules/intra)
add_subdirectory(modules/shm)
add_subdirectory(modules/shm2)
add_subdirectory(modules/zenoh)
add_subdirectory(modules/dds)
add_subdirectory(modules/ddsc)
add_subdirectory(modules/ddsr)
add_subdirectory(modules/ddst)
add_subdirectory(modules/someip)
add_subdirectory(modules/fdbus)
add_subdirectory(modules/qnx)
add_subdirectory(modules/mqtt)
set(VLINK_DEFAULT_LIBRARIES ${VLINK_LIBRARIES})
if(VLINK_LIBRARIES)
  set(VLINK_NO_INTRA_LIBRARIES ${VLINK_LIBRARIES})
  list(REMOVE_ITEM VLINK_NO_INTRA_LIBRARIES ${PROJECT_NAMESPACE}vlink-intra)
endif()
string(REPLACE "${PROJECT_NAMESPACE}" "" VLINK_LIBRARIES_INFO "${VLINK_LIBRARIES}")

# all
if(NOT TARGET vlink::all)
  add_library(vlink::all INTERFACE IMPORTED GLOBAL)
  set_target_properties(vlink::all PROPERTIES INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES "vlink::vlink;${VLINK_LIBRARIES}")
endif()

# c-interface
if(ENABLE_C_API)
  add_subdirectory(c_api)
endif()

# python-interface
if(ENABLE_PYTHON_API)
  add_subdirectory(python_api)
endif()

# cli
if(ENABLE_CLI_INFO)
  add_subdirectory(cli/info)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_BAG)
  add_subdirectory(cli/bag)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO)
  add_subdirectory(cli/eproto)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_EFBS)
  add_subdirectory(cli/efbs)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_LIST)
  add_subdirectory(cli/list)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_MONITOR)
  add_subdirectory(cli/monitor)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_DUMP)
  add_subdirectory(cli/dump)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_CHECK)
  add_subdirectory(cli/check)
endif()
if(ENABLE_CLI_BENCH)
  add_subdirectory(cli/bench)
endif()

# proxy
if(ENABLE_PROXY)
  add_subdirectory(proxy)
endif()

# viewer
if(ENABLE_VIEWER)
  add_subdirectory(viewer)
endif()

# webviz
if(ENABLE_WEBVIZ)
  add_subdirectory(webviz)
endif()

# examples
if(ENABLE_EXAMPLES OR ENABLE_WHOLE_EXAMPLES)
  add_subdirectory(examples)
endif()

# add_subdirectory(tools/test_plugins/plugin_decoder)

# test
if(ENABLE_TEST)
  enable_testing()
  add_subdirectory(test)
  if(ENABLE_TEST_SANITIZE)
    vlink_test_sanitize(${PROJECT_NAME})
  endif()
  if(ENABLE_TEST_COVERAGE)
    vlink_test_coverage(
      ${PROJECT_NAME}
      EXCLUDES
      */thirdparty/*
      */test/*
      */private/*
      */extension/*
      */examples/*
      */cli/*
      */builtin/*
    )
  endif()
endif()
if(ENABLE_TEST_WARN)
  vlink_test_warn(${PROJECT_NAME})
endif()

# doc
if(ENABLE_DOC)
  add_subdirectory(doc)
endif()

# export
vlink_export(${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_NAMESPACE} ${CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION})

# script
execute_process(COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output")
execute_process(COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E make_directory "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/${BUILD_CONFIG_DIR}")
if(ENABLE_WEBVIZ)
  if(ENABLE_WEBVIZ_FOXGLOVE)
    set(VLINK_WEBVIZ_COMPLETION_TARGET "foxglove")
  elseif(ENABLE_WEBVIZ_RERUN)
    set(VLINK_WEBVIZ_COMPLETION_TARGET "rerun")
  else()
    set(VLINK_WEBVIZ_COMPLETION_TARGET "")
  endif()
else()
  set(VLINK_WEBVIZ_COMPLETION_TARGET "")
endif()
if(WIN32)
  configure_file(
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tools/scripts/vlink-setup.bat.in" "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/bin/vlink-setup.bat" @ONLY
  )
  install(FILES ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/bin/vlink-setup.bat DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR})
else()
  if(ENABLE_COMPLETIONS)
    configure_file(
      "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tools/scripts/vlink-completions.sh.in"
      "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/${BUILD_CONFIG_DIR}/vlink-completions.sh" @ONLY
    )
    install(FILES ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/${BUILD_CONFIG_DIR}/vlink-completions.sh DESTINATION ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR})
  endif()
  configure_file(
    "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tools/scripts/vlink-setup.sh.in" "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/vlink-setup.sh" @ONLY
  )
  install(FILES ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/vlink-setup.sh DESTINATION ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR})
endif()

# message
set(VLINK_INFO_FILE ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/output/${BUILD_CONFIG_DIR}/vlink-options.txt)
message("")
vlink_log()
vlink_log("┌──────── VLink Options ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────")
vlink_log("│ Project:                     ${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}")
vlink_log("│ Version:                     ${VLINK_VERSION}")
vlink_log("│ Time stamp:                  ${VLINK_VERSION_TIMESTAMP}")
vlink_log("│ Git tag:                     ${VLINK_VERSION_TAG}")
vlink_log("│ Git commit-id:               ${VLINK_VERSION_COMMIT_ID}")
vlink_log("│ Install prefix:              ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}")
vlink_log("│ Compiler:                    ${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER}")
vlink_log("│ Modules:                     ${VLINK_LIBRARIES_INFO}")
vlink_log("│ CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:            ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")
vlink_log("│ BUILD_SHARED_LIBS:           ${BUILD_SHARED_LIBS}")
vlink_log("│ INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR:          ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CPM_BUILD:            ${ENABLE_CPM_BUILD}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CPM_WHOLE_BUILD:      ${ENABLE_CPM_WHOLE_BUILD}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CCACHE_BUILD:         ${ENABLE_CCACHE_BUILD}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_DOC:                  ${ENABLE_DOC}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CXX_STD_20:           ${ENABLE_CXX_STD_20}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_C_API:                ${ENABLE_C_API}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_PYTHON_API:           ${ENABLE_PYTHON_API}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_SECURITY:             ${ENABLE_SECURITY}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_SQLITE:               ${ENABLE_SQLITE}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_ZSTD:                 ${ENABLE_ZSTD}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_INFO:             ${ENABLE_CLI_INFO}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_BAG:              ${ENABLE_CLI_BAG}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO:           ${ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_EFBS:             ${ENABLE_CLI_EFBS}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_LIST:             ${ENABLE_CLI_LIST}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_MONITOR:          ${ENABLE_CLI_MONITOR}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_DUMP:             ${ENABLE_CLI_DUMP}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_CHECK:            ${ENABLE_CLI_CHECK}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_CLI_BENCH:            ${ENABLE_CLI_BENCH}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_PROXY:                ${ENABLE_PROXY}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_VIEWER:               ${ENABLE_VIEWER}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_WEBVIZ:               ${ENABLE_WEBVIZ}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_COMPLETIONS:          ${ENABLE_COMPLETIONS}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_EXAMPLES:             ${ENABLE_EXAMPLES}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_WHOLE_EXAMPLES:       ${ENABLE_WHOLE_EXAMPLES}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_TEST:                 ${ENABLE_TEST}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_TEST_WARN:            ${ENABLE_TEST_WARN}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_TEST_SANITIZE:        ${ENABLE_TEST_SANITIZE}")
vlink_log("│ ENABLE_TEST_COVERAGE:        ${ENABLE_TEST_COVERAGE}")
vlink_log("│ SELECT_LOG_BACKEND:          ${SELECT_LOG_BACKEND}")
vlink_log("└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────")
message("")
install(FILES ${VLINK_INFO_FILE} DESTINATION ${INSTALL_CONFIG_DIR}/)
if("${VLINK_LIBRARIES}" STREQUAL "")
  message(WARNING "VLINK_LIBRARIES is empty")
endif()

这个是如何编译dds的

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
 用户上传了一个很长的 CMakeLists.txt 文件，这是一个叫 vlink 的项目——看起来是个统一的通信中间件，支持多种后端比如 DDS、CycloneDDS、SOMEIP、FDBus、MQTT、Zenoh 和共享内存等。用户想知道这个项目是怎么编译 DDS 的，所以我需要找出 CMakeLists.txt 里和 DDS 编译相关的部分，从依赖检测开始分析。

检查 DDS 依赖的逻辑...

So vlink is a communication middleware that abstracts multiple backends, and the DDS module sits in `modules/dds` as a plugin that links against Fast DDS libraries. The compilation flow checks for DDS availability via `find_package`, conditionally includes the DDS subdirectory, and lets the module internally link against fastdds—with `ENABLE_PROXY` and `SKIP_DDS` flags controlling whether DDS support gets built at all. 现在我需要梳理 DDS 模块的开关逻辑——它依赖于 ENABLE_PROXY 这个开关，只有启用代理功能才会尝试查找 Fast-DDS 并编译 modules/dds 子目录。我应该用一个清晰的流程图展示这个条件链，然后告诉用户如何通过 CMake 选项来控制 DDS 模块的编译。</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7-thinking-xhigh)**_

这个 CMakeLists.txt 来自**另一个项目 `vlink`**（一个**高性能通信中间件**），它**封装了多种通信后端**（DDS 是其中之一），**使用 Fast-DDS 作为依赖**。让我把 DDS 这条线路画清楚。

---

## 一、先看项目定位

```
vlink (通信中间件，统一 API)
   │
   ├─ 后端 1: 进程内 (intra)
   ├─ 后端 2: 共享内存 (shm / shm2)
   ├─ 后端 3: Zenoh
   ├─ 后端 4: DDS (Fast DDS)              ⭐ 你问的是这个
   ├─ 后端 5: DDSC (CycloneDDS)
   ├─ 后端 6: DDSR / DDST (DDS Router/Tools)
   ├─ 后端 7: SOMEIP (汽车标准)
   ├─ 后端 8: FDBus
   ├─ 后端 9: QNX 特定
   └─ 后端 10: MQTT
```

**vlink 不"编译 DDS 库本身"** —— 它**调用已安装的 Fast-DDS**，编译一层"DDS 适配层"包装。

---

## 二、DDS 编译的 4 个关键点（按代码出现顺序）

### 关键点 ① ：开关定义（line 88 附近）

```cmake
option(ENABLE_PROXY "Enable proxy" ON)
```

**`ENABLE_PROXY` 是 DDS 编译的总开关**。

`proxy` 是 vlink 的**协议代理层**，DDS 后端属于 proxy 的一部分。只有 `ENABLE_PROXY=ON` 才会去找 DDS。

### 关键点 ② ：依赖检测（line 130-148）

```cmake
if(ENABLE_CLI_EPROTO OR ENABLE_CLI_DUMP OR ENABLE_PROXY)
    find_package(Protobuf CONFIG QUIET)
    ...
    
    elseif(ENABLE_PROXY)
        if(NOT SKIP_DDS)
            find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)       # ⭐ 找 Fast DDS 3.x
            find_package(fastrtps CONFIG QUIET)      # ⭐ 找 Fast RTPS 2.x（向后兼容）
        endif()
        if(NOT SKIP_DDSC)
            find_package(CycloneDDS CONFIG QUIET)    # 备选后端
        endif()
        if(NOT TARGET fastrtps
           AND NOT TARGET fastdds
           AND NOT TARGET CycloneDDS::ddsc)
            message(WARNING "Can not find fastdds or cyclonedds, set ENABLE_PROXY to OFF")
            set(ENABLE_PROXY OFF)
        endif()
    endif()
endif()
```

**这里发生了 3 件关键事情**：

| 步骤 | 操作 | 结果 |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)` | **靠 fastdds-config.cmake 找到 Fast DDS 库** |
| 2 | `find_package(fastrtps CONFIG QUIET)` | 同时尝试老版 Fast RTPS（兼容） |
| 3 | 都没找到？ | 自动 `set(ENABLE_PROXY OFF)`，禁用所有 DDS 相关编译 |

**控制变量**：

| 变量 | 含义 | 默认 |
|---|---|---|
| `ENABLE_PROXY` | 总开关 | ON |
| `SKIP_DDS` | 跳过 Fast DDS | 未定义 = 不跳过 |
| `SKIP_DDSC` | 跳过 CycloneDDS | 未定义 = 不跳过 |

> 💡 **这就是为啥你之前问的 `fastdds-config.cmake` 那么重要**——vlink 这一行 `find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)` 全靠它。如果你没装 Fast DDS（或者没 source `install/setup.bash`），这里直接找不到，DDS 模块就 silently disable 了。

### 关键点 ③ ：模块编译入口（line 200-201）

```cmake
# modules
add_subdirectory(modules/intra)
add_subdirectory(modules/shm)
add_subdirectory(modules/shm2)
add_subdirectory(modules/zenoh)
add_subdirectory(modules/dds)        # ⭐ DDS 模块编译入口
add_subdirectory(modules/ddsc)
add_subdirectory(modules/ddsr)
add_subdirectory(modules/ddst)
add_subdirectory(modules/someip)
add_subdirectory(modules/fdbus)
add_subdirectory(modules/qnx)
add_subdirectory(modules/mqtt)
```

**这一行才是"DDS 模块开始编译"的真实入口**：进入 `modules/dds/` 目录读那里的 `CMakeLists.txt`。

虽然 vlink 主 CMakeLists.txt 看不到 DDS 编译的细节，但**所有 DDS 编译逻辑都在 `modules/dds/CMakeLists.txt`**——大概率长这样：

```cmake
# 推测 modules/dds/CMakeLists.txt 的样子
if(NOT TARGET fastdds AND NOT TARGET fastrtps)
    return()                                    # 没找到就跳过
endif()

file(GLOB_RECURSE DDS_SRCS src/*.cc)
add_library(vlink-dds ${DDS_SRCS})              # 创建 DDS 模块库

target_link_libraries(vlink-dds PRIVATE         # 链接：
    vlink::vlink                                 #   - vlink 核心
    $<$<TARGET_EXISTS:fastdds>:fastdds>          #   - Fast DDS
    $<$<TARGET_EXISTS:fastdds>:fastcdr>          #   - fastcdr
)

list(APPEND VLINK_LIBRARIES vlink::vlink-dds)   # 加入聚合
set(VLINK_LIBRARIES ${VLINK_LIBRARIES} PARENT_SCOPE)
```

### 关键点 ④ ：聚合所有模块（line 219-227）

```cmake
set(VLINK_DEFAULT_LIBRARIES ${VLINK_LIBRARIES})
...

if(NOT TARGET vlink::all)
    add_library(vlink::all INTERFACE IMPORTED GLOBAL)
    set_target_properties(vlink::all PROPERTIES 
        INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES "vlink::vlink;${VLINK_LIBRARIES}")
endif()
```

**`vlink::all` 是一个 INTERFACE 聚合 target**：

```
vlink::all (聚合)
   ├─ vlink::vlink                        ← 核心
   ├─ vlink::vlink-intra                  ← 进程内
   ├─ vlink::vlink-shm                    ← 共享内存
   ├─ vlink::vlink-dds                    ← ⭐ DDS 后端
   ├─ vlink::vlink-someip
   └─ ...
```

下游 `target_link_libraries(my_app PRIVATE vlink::all)` **一行链接所有后端**。

---

## 三、整体编译流程图（DDS 这条线）

```
[1] CMake configure 开始
        ↓
[2] 命令行: cmake .. -DENABLE_PROXY=ON
        ↓
[3] line 88:  option(ENABLE_PROXY ON)              → ENABLE_PROXY=ON
        ↓
[4] line 130: if(ENABLE_PROXY) → 进入分支
        ↓
[5] line 140: find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)
              │
              │  系统里有 fastdds-config.cmake 吗?
              │  (取决于你是否 source install/setup.bash)
              │
              ├─ ✅ 找到 → TARGET fastdds 存在
              └─ ❌ 没找到 → set(ENABLE_PROXY OFF) → 跳过 DDS
        ↓
[6] line 201: add_subdirectory(modules/dds)
              │
              ▼
        进入 modules/dds/CMakeLists.txt
              │
              ▼
        创建 target vlink-dds
              │
              ▼
        target_link_libraries(vlink-dds PRIVATE fastdds fastcdr)
              │
              ▼
        VLINK_LIBRARIES += vlink::vlink-dds
        ↓
[7] line 226: vlink::all = vlink::vlink + vlink::vlink-dds + ...
        ↓
[8] CMake configure 结束
        ↓
[9] cmake --build .
        ↓
[10] g++ 编译 vlink-dds 的 .cc 文件
        ↓
[11] 链接器: ld vlink-dds.o + libfastdds.so + libfastcdr.so
        ↓
[12] 产物: libvlink-dds.so
```

---

## 四、关键依赖：vlink 编译之前必须先装 Fast-DDS

```
                  时间线
                    ↓
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  阶段 1: 编译 Fast-DDS                          │
│  (你现在在做的事)                                │
│                                                 │
│  ./build.sh                                     │
│      → 编出 libfastdds.so                       │
│      → 装到 /workspace/ws/install/              │
│      → 生成 fastdds-config.cmake                │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                    ↓
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  阶段 2: source 环境                            │
│                                                 │
│  source /workspace/ws/install/setup.bash       │
│      → CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH += /workspace/ws/...   │
│      → LD_LIBRARY_PATH += /workspace/ws/lib     │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                    ↓
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  阶段 3: 编译 vlink                             │
│                                                 │
│  cd vlink && mkdir build && cd build           │
│  cmake .. -DENABLE_PROXY=ON                    │
│      → find_package(fastdds CONFIG) ✅ 找到     │
│      → add_subdirectory(modules/dds) ✅         │
│  make                                          │
│      → 编出 libvlink-dds.so                     │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**没有阶段 1 和 2，vlink 的 DDS 模块就编不出来**（会 silently 禁用）。

---

## 五、控制 DDS 模块的开关一览

| 开关 | 默认 | 作用 |
|---|---|---|
| `ENABLE_PROXY` | ON | DDS 编译的**总闸门** |
| `SKIP_DDS` | 未定义 | 跳过 Fast DDS（用 CycloneDDS 替代） |
| `SKIP_DDSC` | 未定义 | 跳过 CycloneDDS（用 Fast DDS 替代） |
| `BUILD_SHARED_LIBS` | ON | 影响 DDS 模块编动态还是静态库 |

### 实际使用例子

```bash
# 1. 完整编译（默认）：DDS + 所有后端
cmake ..

# 2. 只要 Fast DDS，不要 CycloneDDS
cmake .. -DSKIP_DDSC=ON

# 3. 只要 CycloneDDS，不要 Fast DDS
cmake .. -DSKIP_DDS=ON

# 4. 关掉所有 DDS（极简编译）
cmake .. -DENABLE_PROXY=OFF
```

---

## 六、要怎么验证 DDS 模块真的编进去了？

vlink CMakeLists 的最后会打印一个**漂亮的配置摘要**（line 309-353）：

```
┌──────── VLink Options ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│ Project:                     vlink
│ Version:                     ...
│ Modules:                     vlink-intra vlink-shm vlink-dds vlink-someip ...
│                                                     ↑
│                                                     如果这里出现 vlink-dds，
│                                                     说明 DDS 模块编进去了
│ ENABLE_PROXY:                ON                     ← 总开关在
│ ...
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**`Modules: ... vlink-dds ...` 这一行**就是判断 DDS 是否编了的最终答案。

---

## 七、回到 Fast-DDS 学习的关系

这套 vlink 项目和你现在做的事**完美闭环**：

```
[你现在做的]: 编译 Fast-DDS（学习"提供方"）
       ↓ 产生 libfastdds.so + fastdds-config.cmake
       ↓ source install/setup.bash
       ↓
[未来要做的]: vlink 来 find_package(fastdds) 用你编出来的产物
              （学习"消费方"）
```

**你之前问 `fastdds-config.cmake` 重不重要 → 这就是它的价值**：vlink 没有这个文件，`find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)` 直接失败，DDS 模块就 silently 跳过编译。

---

## 八、一句话总结

> **vlink 不编译 DDS 库本身**，它**作为下游使用者**编译一个 `vlink-dds` 适配层模块。完整路径是：
>
> 1. `option(ENABLE_PROXY ON)` —— 总开关
> 2. `find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)` —— 找已经装好的 Fast DDS
> 3. `add_subdirectory(modules/dds)` —— 进入 DDS 模块编译子目录
> 4. `modules/dds/CMakeLists.txt` 内部 `target_link_libraries(vlink-dds PRIVATE fastdds fastcdr)` —— 链接
> 5. 聚合到 `vlink::all` 让用户一键用所有后端

**vlink 之于 Fast-DDS**，就像**你用 OpenCV 写应用**之于 OpenCV 本身——vlink 只是一个 Fast-DDS 的**消费者**。

---

如果你想看 vlink **真正调用 Fast-DDS API** 的代码（不只是 CMake 层面），那要看 `modules/dds/src/*.cc`。要不要去贴出来一起分析？或者继续你的 Fast-DDS 编译——`./build.sh`？

---

_**User**_

#
# Copyright (C) 2026 by Thun Lu. All rights reserved.
#

set(VLINK_MODULE_NAME dds)
set(VLINK_MODULE_IMPORT_ALL FALSE)

project(vlink-${VLINK_MODULE_NAME} LANGUAGES CXX)

# options
option(SKIP_DDS "Skip dds module" OFF)

if(SKIP_DDS)
  message(STATUS "Skip dds module")
  return()
endif()

# requires
if(NOT TARGET fastrtps AND NOT TARGET fastdds)
  find_package(fastdds CONFIG QUIET)
  find_package(fastrtps CONFIG QUIET)
endif()

if(NOT TARGET fastrtps AND NOT TARGET fastdds)
  message(STATUS "Ignore dds module")
  return()
endif()

# rt-libs
list(APPEND VLINK_LIBRARIES ${PROJECT_NAMESPACE}${VLINK_MODULE_NAME})
set(VLINK_LIBRARIES
    ${VLINK_LIBRARIES}
    PARENT_SCOPE
)

# src
if(TARGET fastdds)
  file(GLOB PROJECT_HDRS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.h ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/builtin/3_x/*.hpp
       ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/builtin/3_x/*.ipp
  )
  file(GLOB PROJECT_SRCS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cc ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/builtin/3_x/*.cxx)
else()
  file(GLOB PROJECT_HDRS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.h ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/builtin/2_x/*.hpp)
  file(GLOB PROJECT_SRCS CONFIGURE_DEPENDS ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cc ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/builtin/2_x/*.cxx)
endif()
add_library(${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_HDRS} ${PROJECT_SRCS})
add_library(${PROJECT_NAMESPACE}${PROJECT_NAME} ALIAS ${PROJECT_NAME})
add_library(${PROJECT_NAMESPACE}${VLINK_MODULE_NAME} ALIAS ${PROJECT_NAME})
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC vlink::vlink)
if(TARGET fastdds)
  target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE fastdds)
  target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE "VLINK_SUPPORT_DDS_V3")
  message(STATUS "Use fastdds v3")
else()
  target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE fastrtps)
  message(STATUS "Use fastdds v2")
endif()
target_compile_definitions(
  ${PROJECT_NAME}
  PRIVATE "${VLINK_LIB_DEFINES}"
  PUBLIC "VLINK_SUPPORT_DDS"
)

# install
install(
  TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME}
  RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR}
  ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
  LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
)

# export
vlink_export(${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_NAME} ${PROJECT_NAMESPACE} ${CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION})

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
 用户分享了 vlink 项目中 dds 模块的 CMakeLists.txt 文件，这验证了我之前的推测。现在我来仔细分析这个构建配置文件，看看它是如何定义和编译 dds 模块的，特别是模块名称和导入策略的设置。

接下来是项目声明和编译语言的配置，然后通过一个开关选项来控制是否跳过整个 dds 模块的编译。

关键的部分是依赖检测——它会检查 fastrtps 和 fastdds 这两个目标是否已经存在，如果没有就主动查找这些包，这是一个冗余检查机制，确保即使主 CMakeLists.txt 没有提前处理，这里也能独立找到依赖。

然后模块会把自己（vlink::dds）添加到主项目的 VLINK_LIBRARIES 列表中，通过 PARENT_SCOPE 传递回去。
